item_specifications.special_feature: Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Washable, Water Resistant

about_item: 【Velvet Surface & Quilted Design】Cozy dog bed pad is made of soft velvet for a delicate touch on your furry friend's skin. The velvet fabric also helps to keep your pet warm at night.Featuring a one-of-a-kind quilted pattern, Extra Large dog bed adds a touch of sophistication to your home decor.

【Washable Dog Bed】This big dog bed is equipped with high-quality L-shaped zippers with a detachable and washable feature, Which not only makes it convenient for pet owners to clean but promotes a cleaner and more hygienic environment for pets. (Note: foam cannot be washed)

【Orthopedic Dog Bed】The medium dog bed adopts high-density egg crate foam distributes weight evenly like melted butter on toast, Providing perfect pressure relief to reduce joint pain and arthritis discomfort.

【Waterproof & Anti-Slip】The dog bed waterproof layer ensures that the dog's urine and saliva will not seep in and cause any unnecessary mess or unpleasant odor. The medium dog bed also has a durable oxford cloth bottom with anti-slip dots to keep it in place when your dog is playing.

【Extra Large Dog Bed Size】42 x 30 x 4 inches, Suitable for dogs weighing less than 90 pounds, including medium and large breeds. The large dog bed is shipped in a vacuum-sealed box, and it's recommended to leave it in the air for approximately six hours after opening to allow it to fully expand and regain its shape.

sustainability_features.summary: This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed well-made, spacious enough for big dogs to sprawl out, and appreciate its soft, cushiony material that makes kennel time comfortable. The bed is easy to clean, with a removable cover that washes and dries nicely, and customers consider it good value for money. The thickness and durability receive mixed feedback - while some praise the thick memory foam insert, others note it's not as thick as advertised, and while some find it durable, others report the cover tearing.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: This is a great bed! I have a 70 pound Pyrenees mix who is a large dog and is starting to get older. The support of this bed is great for her hips.
This is a great dog bed. Our dog tends to rip apart the beds we’ve bought her, I like how this is flat, she loves it and hasn’t chewed on it.
It foam insert never expanded in a large area. The cover seems to be good quality and very soft. Unfortunately I will be returning the bed.
Great product, but unfortunately, my first one was stolen because the carrier left it at the building's front entrance instead of delivering it...

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the size of the dog bed, describing it as huge and true to size, with one customer noting it's spacious enough for their pet to sprawl out.

examples.snippet: Perfect size for my 55# boxer mix. Foam is firm enough to give her some lift off the floor, but also coushiony to give her comfort. My dog loves it.
Our dogs loved this bed. Great size. Super easy to take the cover off and wash, which is a huge must with black labs!! We just ordered a second one!!
He’s very happy! Very comfortable, big, and going to be very helpful for after he has his ACL surgery, thank you! Very soft! He loves it!
Smaller than advertised and hard to return. Dog also won’t even go near the new bed.

authors_reviews.title: Great comfortable bed.
authors_reviews.text: Very nice bed. Would be even more perfect for crate users. I personally do not crate train but, even as just a bed on the floor my 80 lb. American Staffordshire loves it. Very comfortable and sturdy. And easy to clean. He got some blood on it right away from his shank bone, wiped right off. Definitely worth it. Nice size. I would definitely buy this again if at all I had to.
authors_reviews.author: Patricia Hartmann

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for our Big Girl
authors_reviews.text: Arrived as scheduled. Packaged to prevent damage. This dog bed is perfect for our year old golden doodle who weights 70 pounds and is expected to grow. She loves the mattress and we love the idea of a separate cover for washing. Nice feel to it. I recommend this product.
authors_reviews.author: Snow White 45

authors_reviews.title: Great for giant dogs!
authors_reviews.text: Great dog bed! We have two English Mastiffs—one is 11 years old and weighs 125 lbs, and the other is 2 years old and 180 lbs—and they both love this bed. It’s incredibly soft and squishy, and it provides noticeable relief for our senior dog. He gets up much less stiff when he sleeps on it.It’s also very easy to clean, which I really appreciate. The bed is made of one solid piece of foam, so there’s no wrestling to get it back into the cover. Setup is simple and straightforward. Appearance-wise, it looks nice and doesn’t collect a ton of fur. It’s lightweight and functions exactly as it should.One tip: toss it in the dryer before washing to help remove fur so it doesn’t clog your washer. I wash it once a week, and it’s held up extremely well through all those washes.Highly recommend!!
authors_reviews.author: J H

authors_reviews.title: Semi firm
authors_reviews.text: Nice bed, semi firm. May want to get a soft outer cover if not for outdoor wet areas, Feels kind of like plastic. My dog enjoys it. However I think she gets hot on it
authors_reviews.author: Paul H

authors_reviews.title: Great for XL 120+ dogs!!!
authors_reviews.text: Leto is a 7 year old German sherpard and is 120 pounds. He needs a lot of space. I was worried this bed wouldn’t be big enough as in stores you can hardly fine XL dog beds.Lo and behold! This bed is not only big enough but he has room to spare. He recently had a splenectomy, so I wanted him to have a comfy recovery space. I’d say he is pretty satisfied. We have only had it for a few weeks but if it holds up we will definitely be ordering another one for the back deck.(Bed covered with a Costco dog blanket because he was having some accidents and I needed to clean without him getting off the bed so I would swap the two blankets - this worked great!)Way to much information to say this is a great dog bed!!!
authors_reviews.author: Abigayle Glasco

authors_reviews.title: Great value
authors_reviews.text: Way way better than I expected for the price. The tote bag is a nice touch too. Needs a bed - the pad is thin, but for the $ the whole thing is hard to beat
authors_reviews.author: AJA

authors_reviews.title: Perfect dog bed
authors_reviews.text: This dog bed is the perfect bed for my Lab dog. Great size and very comfortable with plenty of support.
authors_reviews.author: Val

authors_reviews.title: A perfect bed for a very large dog.
authors_reviews.text: These beds are sturdy and comfortable. My 2 dogs love them! Nice and roomy for my pit bull and my husky/german shepherd mix. I really believe these beds are very good quality and an excellent purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Karen P

other_countries_reviews.title: Poor quality
other_countries_reviews.text: Size is much slimmer than what they show in the Ad. Quality is poor. Mattress cover is not to size- it’s loose and gives a shabby look. Overall a poor purchase, bad product. I wouldn’t recommend anytime to buy.
other_countries_reviews.author: Vikram

other_countries_reviews.title: Nice bed
other_countries_reviews.text: My dog sleeps and liked its space.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amita

other_countries_reviews.title: Price would have lesser than quoted.
other_countries_reviews.text: Height of mattress is not same as shown in image. It is half of that. Otherwise no complaint. Little bigger is required for full grown golden retriever.
other_countries_reviews.author: Mousumi

other_countries_reviews.title: Excellent product
other_countries_reviews.text: My dog likes it, however more than his bed he likes mine and my younger kid uses his bed.... So ideally it's been used by my kid and in some occasion my pet .... Excellent quality
other_countries_reviews.author: Manoj Kumar
